name: paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month tool
description: For paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month, inefficient summarization causes delays in case preparation. We automate the formatting of case management summaries instead of manual summarization of client intake forms.
target_audience: paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month
problem_solved: Inefficient summarization of client intake forms
features: manual input for client intake forms

locked_fields.primary_user: paralegals in small law firms processing 5–15 client intake forms/month
locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient summarization of client intake forms

must_have_features: manual input for client intake forms
